text.title: Guardrails Concepts Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end: RAG-backed customer support bot. p99 latency budget 1500 ms, HIPAA scope, Claude Sonnet base model.

example.note: Step 1: classify_pipeline → rag (retrieval + chat, single agent). Step 2: stages → input, retrieval, output. Step 3: threat-model rails → pii-mask (input), chunk-injection-scan (retrieval), schema-validate + medical-advice-block (output). Step 4: actions → pii=transform; injection-scan=filter; schema=block; advice-block=block (HIPAA). Step 5: tiers → regex (5 ms) + classifier (50 ms); LLM-judge dropped (budget too tight given Claude inference). Step 6: frameworks → custom (pii regex), custom (chunk scan), guardrails-ai (schema), llama-guard (advice classifier).
Same scenario, but stage=output gets one giant LLM-as-judge rail and no tier-1 regex. Median latency triples; injection in retrieval slips through because no retrieval rail exists.
